title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : e-mail de bienvenue
instructions: Lisez l'e-mail et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
Dear Mr. Diaz,

Welcome to Bright Solutions! We are delighted that you {{1}} join our team as a Junior Analyst starting next Monday.

On your first day, please arrive at 9 a.m. and check in at the front desk. {{2}}, you will need to bring a valid form of identification for our records.

Your manager, Ms. Cole, will meet with you in the morning to go over your schedule for the first week. {{3}}, you will attend an orientation session in the afternoon with other new hires.

If you have any questions before your start date, please {{4}} hesitate to contact the HR department.

questions.explanation: L'arrivée du salarié est un événement futur ("starting next Monday") : "you will join".
On ajoute une information supplémentaire (apporter une pièce d'identité) : "In addition".
On indique la suite chronologique de la journée : "Afterward" (ensuite).
Expression figée : "please do not hesitate to contact".
